title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 237.110 - Liable to action for damages
text:
237.110.  Liable to action for damages. — Such persons shall be liable to a civil action for all damages that may accrue to the person licensed to keep such ferry.
(RSMo 1939 § 15300) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 14212; 1919 § 5546; 1909 § 6489
